martha.name: Martha
martha.comment: Martha, Friday evening is looking perfect for a cycle, around 20-22°C with a calm wind - grab Britt and make the most of it. The headwinds earlier in the day won't be a problem then, and you can both enjoy a well-deserved drink after. Running's not ideal due to the heat, so leave that for another day.

britt.name: Britt
britt.comment: Britt, Friday evening is looking perfect for a ride, 20:00–22:00 is your window with ideal temps around 23°C. Noticeable headwind earlier, but it calms down later. If Martha's free, drag her along and make a night of it.
